task_completion.description: Exclude 'Legacy-Converter' and 'ThirdParty-Utils' from the 'ActiveDoseDev' working set

integrity.description: Agent used the Eclipse GUI to configure working sets
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Eclipse menus (e.g., Package Explorer view menu -> Top Level Elements -> Working Sets) and dialogs, rather than editing configuration files in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the workingsets.xml file
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show commands like 'echo', 'sed', or 'nano' being used on '/home/ga/eclipse-workspace/.metadata/.plugins/org.eclipse.ui.workbench/workingsets.xml'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Eclipse IDE application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Eclipse IDE interface is visible and active in the screenshots, with the Package Explorer properly rendering the Java projects.
